overview: Talent Pulse AI is a full-stack AI-driven platform for resume analysis and job matching. Users sign in, upload resumes, receive AI-powered ATS scoring and skills gap analysis, and discover job matches with detailed alignment scores — all in a sleek dark theme.
features: Internet Identity sign-up and login with protected pages
Resume upload and storage with multiple versions
AI-powered ATS scoring, skills gap analysis, and improvement suggestions
Job matching engine with relevance scores and detailed breakdowns
Match detail view with skill comparison, red flags, and cover letter suggestions
Dashboard with stats, recent matches, and quick actions
Dark theme with professional high-contrast design
